system.description: Imagination is real enough. Step into a painting, photograph, video, novel, or other piece of art and roll [quality].
system.synopsis: Jump into a work of art.

outcomes.success:
you and any nearby allies you choose enter the world depicted. While
inside you may manipulate objects, converse
with people, and see from perspectives not
featured in the original frame.
outcomes.every3rd3:
choose one:
  • You and your allies change appearances to fit in with the art.
  • When you leave, this piece of art is returned to its original condition.
outcomes.failure:
you forget how to hide your tracks.
Opportunistic characters from nearby art can
follow you and enter Reality on their own.

improvement.question: When I finish a story, I often wish I could...

answer1.text: Spend more time with the characters.

answer2.text: Share the lesson with someone who needs it.
